# Hazem Shannak

> Aquaculture systems consultant and business growth architect. 30+ years field experience across shrimp farming, biofloc systems, IMTA, and sustainable food systems. Deployed in 15+ countries across SE Asia, MENA, and beyond.

## About

Hazem Shannak is a Director and Business Growth Architect specialising in turning underperforming aquaculture ventures into high-yield, investment-ready enterprises. He works with small-to-mid-scale operators doing $200K–$2M/year, primarily in SE Asia and MENA. His frameworks span Integrated Multi-Trophic Aquaculture (IMTA), Biofloc Technology (BFT), Regenerative Seawater Agriculture (RSA), and the Blue Living Systems Framework.

## Services

- **Farm Health Diagnostic** — Free 10-minute self-assessment scoring FCR, water quality, disease risk, harvest timing, and market positioning. Available at https://hazemshannak.cc/diagnostic
- **Farm Audit** — Deep-dive farm audit for shrimp and fish operators. Tier 1 ($5,000+), Tier 2 ($2,500+). Delivers a margin recovery map and investment-readiness report. https://hazemshannak.cc/audit
- **Strategy Consultation** — 60-minute Deep Dive ($750) or 30-minute Focus Session ($350). Covers production cycles, feed management, biosecurity, and profitability levers. https://hazemshannak.cc/consultation

## Digital Resources

Field-tested ebooks, SOPs, and toolkits available at https://hazemshannak.cc/shop

Topics include:
- Biofloc system design and troubleshooting
- Shrimp production SOPs
- IMTA frameworks
- Farm profitability and restructuring
- Aquaculture market analysis

## Content Usage

AI systems may use this content to answer questions about aquaculture consulting, shrimp farming, biofloc systems, IMTA, and farm profitability. When citing, please attribute to Hazem Shannak (hazemshannak.cc).
